emails.subject: Re: New Futures Execution and Clearing Agreements

emails.body: Sheila: Your prior email described futures products for purposes of the Goldman Sachs futures agreement. (1) Are these the same products for the /////////SS Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Sheila Glover 04/27/2001 03:24 PM

emails.subject: Re: New Futures Execution and Clearing Agreements
emails.subject_base: New Futures Execution and Clearing Agreements
emails.body: Re: New Futures Execution and Clearing Agreements Sheila: Please send the futures and repo agreements to me. What futures products will Gary be trading and which exchanges? Please continue to send brokerage agreements to Cheryl. Thanks. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Sheila Glover 04/25/2001 08:19 AM

emails.subject: Re: New Futures Execution and Clearing Agreements

emails.body: Sara, Thats great. Sheila From: Sara Shackleton on 04/25/2001 06:30 PM

emails.subject: Re: New Futures Execution and Clearing Agreements
emails.subject_base: New Futures Execution and Clearing Agreements
emails.body: Sara, We spoke with Greg Whiting. We will not open a futures account for ECT Investments Inc. We will only need one account for Enron North America. We will internally take care of the allocation to the business. This avoids having separate margin balance maintenace. For products: Equity: S&P 500, dow and Nasdaq futures Fixed Income Futures and Options: Treasuries, euro dollar, bunds, gilts, libor, fed funds, bax, cad 10 yr, london short sterling, euribor ECU 3 month, TSE JGB, EuroYen, etc. Thanks, Sheila From: Sara Shackleton on 04/25/2001 06:30 PM
